issues.description: Action type 'GiveDon' is incorrect. The effect adds a DON!! card from the DON!! deck and rests it. Should use 'AttachDon' (which attaches/adds DON!! in rested state) or a combination that reflects searching from DON!! deck and resting. 'GiveDon' typically means giving DON!! from hand/pool, not from deck.
Missing cost/condition for the ① cost requirement. The effect should reflect that you may spend 1 resource (rest 1 DON!! from cost area) to activate this effect.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] ① (You may rest the specified number of DON!! cards in your cost area.): Add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and rest it.
